title: Funglue's Metals and Minerals
description:
A mod adding some metals, some non-metals & minerals.
Focused (kinda) on metallurgy.
body:
**Coded in Mcreator!**

Small mod focused on geology and mineralogy.
Find new ores underground and smelt them and create alloys.


Do you want GregTech without the technology (Greg) ~~(aka 90% of the mod)~~ and also slightly more vanilla-esque? 


Then play this mod!  


### The mod adds metals like:
- Zinc
- Lead
- Silver
- Magnesium
- Nickel
- Gallium
- Uranium
etc.
### Also adds some alloys:
- Brass
- Bronze
- Steel
- Duraluminum
- Sterling Silver
- Invar

**This mod is very much uniform, so if you can figure out one alloy, you can figure out them all.**

![Crafting table crafting Hot Invar Ingots, with the description of "To cool this down, stand in a puddle and throw one ar a time."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d055894f8c75eab94f219995efb8ff9fc0157aa.png)
An example of crafting alloys, specifically Invar.

Also WOW do i hate doing parity stuff
also also its been ~~seven~~ ~~eight~~ eleven months???? how??? what??? huh?????
